input.comment: We need role-based permissions because managing access across large teams is risky right now. Admin control is not granular enough.
input.feature_recommendation_justification: This feature should be prioritized as a Should have because it has strong access control and security implications, with a high priority score driven by major impact and near-term urgency.

expected_output.user_story: As an admin, I want to define granular roles and permissions, so that users only access what they are allowed to.
feature_acceptance_criteria: An admin can create and assign roles with distinct permission levels.
A user can only access actions and data permitted by their assigned role.
When a user's role is updated, the new permissions apply immediately.

input.comment: The Jira integration fails randomly and tasks are not syncing properly.
input.feature_recommendation_justification: This feature should be prioritized as a Should have because the integration issue disrupts active task synchronization and has a high priority score from both major impact and near-term urgency.

expected_output.user_story: As a project team member, I want Jira integration sync issues fixed, so that tasks stay reliable across systems during active work.
feature_acceptance_criteria: A user can see task updates synchronized between the platform and Jira.
The system ensures task data remains consistent across both systems.
The system reports synchronization failures without creating duplicate or corrupted tasks.

input.comment: The search feature is frustrating. It’s hard to find old tasks in large projects.
input.feature_recommendation_justification: This feature should be prioritized as a Could have because it creates meaningful search inefficiency, but the priority score and urgency indicate it is manageable in the short term.

expected_output.user_story: As a project user, I want improved search and filtering, so that I can find old tasks in large projects more efficiently.
feature_acceptance_criteria: A user can search tasks by keyword and retrieve relevant results.
The system returns accurate results matching the search query.
The system provides relevant results even in large projects with many tasks.
